---
title: "Aaron Zalen" 
about:
  template: jolla  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/aaron-zalen22
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/1Aaronz/1Aaronz
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: Resume.pdf
      target: _blank
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:AaronZalen222@gmail.com
---

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo \| Geneseo, NY <br> B.S. in Data Analytics \| Aug 2022 - May 2026 <br>
